lanes.summary: Branch-checked visible mission parameters with missing/comment-only runtime consumers and updated canonical docs without gameplay source changes.
Branch-checked the hard-coded 24-hour empty supply-truck cleanup delay and routed the owner-decision cleanup docs without gameplay source changes.
Branch-checked the global auto-wall toggle scope and updated construction/status docs without gameplay source changes.
Branch-checked salvage payout casing, local delete/reward authority and loop shape, then updated construction/status docs without gameplay source changes.
Pruned the stale duplicate auto-wall row from Feature Status and kept the branch-checked row as canonical without gameplay source changes.
Branch-checked camp count helper zero fallback semantics and updated towns/status docs without gameplay source changes.
Branch-checked WASP marker display-54 wait cleanup and updated WASP/status docs without gameplay source changes.
Branch-checked malformed RscClickableText soundPush config and updated UI/status docs without gameplay source changes.
Branch-checked side-supply clamp-first across current source, maintained Vanilla, stable, upstream, perf and release, then updated economy/status docs without gameplay source changes.
Branch-checked vote/help/main-menu UI edge cases across current source, maintained Vanilla, stable, upstream, perf and release, then updated UI/status docs without gameplay source changes.
Final old BE vs current Wasp FPS opportunity scout returned and was compactly harvested into canonical pages.
Claude may self-select bounded source-backed subsystem reviews.
Fold fresh findings into canonical pages and machine files.
Gameplay implementation only when explicitly claimed.
Release/smoke evidence gate for future gameplay patches.
Client skill init, hosted FPS, supply scan, paratrooper markers and commander-built ARTY still need Arma smoke.

rules: Update Progress-Dashboard.md and agent-status.json when visible ownership or lane state changes.
Append, do not overwrite, Agent-Worklog.md and agent-events.jsonl.
Use source-cited evidence for broken/partial-feature claims.
Treat external PDFs as downstream corroboration unless independently source-checked.
If a branch is stale, integrate targeted findings instead of merging over newer navigation.
Keep docs/wiki and the GitHub wiki checkout in parity before publishing.
Use Arma 2 OA scripting references only.
currentStateNote: activeClaims is intentionally compact current-state only. The completed dashboard-current-lanes-freshness and agent-worklog-append-only-guardrail cleanups are preserved in Agent-Worklog.md, agent-events.jsonl and git history; historical published lanes are not live claims.
